faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a standard protocol that lets AI models connect to external tools — enabling Claude to interact with on-chain data, exchange APIs, and more.
faq.a2: All Skills are completely free. You just need a Claude Desktop account.
faq.q3: What if I run into issues?
faq.a3: Join our Telegram community — someone will help you troubleshoot.

skills.noResults: No Skills found matching your criteria

intro.heading: Who is 51?
intro.description: 51 (0x515151) — a hands-on crypto trader from Taiwan, founder of Hunter Association. No textbook theory — only methods that survive the real market. 51Claw is my AI Skills arsenal, turning scattered tools into ready-to-use gear.

openClaw.heading: About 51Claw
openClaw.description: 51Claw is an AI Skills directory built on Claude Code's MCP ecosystem. Curated, audited, and categorized from 150+ tools so you don't have to dig through docs one by one. Every Skill comes with security audit tags and install commands.
